```csharp
using UdonSharp;
using UnityEngine;
using VRC.SDKBase;
using VRC.Udon;

public class InternalCall : UdonSharpBehaviour
{
    private int _value;

    public int Value
    {
        get { return _value; }
    }

    void Start()
    {
        Debug.Log(fibonacci(10).ToString());
        Debug.Log(Value.ToString());
    }

    int fibonacci(int n)
    {
        if (n <= 2)
        {
            return 1;
        }
        return fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2);
    }
}
```

```hex

```
